summary: Prettier/format check failed: an unformatted file was reported and the yarn run exited with code 1.
root_cause: Prettier reported an issue with packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js, causing the yarn command to exit with code 1.

evidence.reason: The job name indicates this CI step was running Prettier/format checks.
The log lists this source file, indicating it was involved in the failure (likely the file Prettier flagged).

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The yarn command failed and returned a non-zero exit code, consistent with a formatting check failing the job.

evidence.quote: info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
evidence.reason: Shows the failing command was run via yarn, confirming the failure originated from a script executed by yarn (the Prettier check).

suggested_fix: Run Prettier to format the offending file and commit the changes, e.g. locally run: yarn prettier --write packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js (or run the project's formatting script), then push the formatted file and re-run CI.
